hypothesis: Add item_id × store_id smoothed target encoding (mean sales per item-store pair using training data only with smoothing factor 50). This is the strongest granularity for encoding baseline demand level and was shown to improve WRMSSE in exp_0014. Building on exp_0012 (best: 0.94640) which had all DOW seasonal features. Replicating exp_0014 setup which achieved 0.97640 but now merging it correctly with the best feature set from exp_0012.
